nl_query: Count revaluation extensions approved per board.
failed_sql:
SELECT b.id AS board_id, b.name, COUNT(rer.id) AS approved_extensions
FROM   board b
JOIN   revaluation_request rr ON rr.board_id = b.id
JOIN   revaluation_extension_request rer ON rer.revaluation_request_id = rr.id
WHERE  rer.approval_status = 'APPROVED'
GROUP  BY b.id, b.name
ORDER  BY approved_extensions DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Unknown table or alias 'rer' referenced in 'rer.id'. Ensure it is declared in the FROM/JOIN clause.
